testcase.name: test_owner_is_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'singularity' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbd226d38940>('plan') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbd226d38940> = {'email': 'jraycwalker@gmail.com', 'is_admin': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_azure_ai_iter10.py:68: in test_owner_is_admin assert me.get("plan") == "singularity" E AssertionError: assert None == 'singularity' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbd226d38940>('plan') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbd226d38940> = {'email': 'jraycwalker@gmail.com', 'is_admin': True}.get

testcase.name: test_generate_type_chat_ready
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_azure_ai_iter10.py:121: in test_generate_type_chat_ready assert r.status_code == 200, f"generate chat failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: generate chat failed: 402 {"detail":"Daily limit reached (5).
